nasb.text: Yet He did not stretch out His hand against the nobles of the sons of Israel; and they saw God, and they ate and drank.

esv.text: And he did not lay his hand on the chief men of the people of Israel; they beheld God, and ate and drank.

cnv.text: 他不伸手攻擊以色列人中的顯貴；他們看見　神，並且又吃又喝。

ccb.text: 上帝没有伸手杀这些以色列的首领，允许他们看见祂，在祂面前吃喝。
